{
  "project_name": "Cricket Worldcup Management System",
  "backend_architecture": "Microservices architecture",
  "services": [
    "User Management Service",
    "Match Management Service",
    "Statistics Service",
    "Notifications Service"
  ],
  "controllers": [
    "UserController",
    "MatchController",
    "StatisticsController",
    "NotificationController"
  ],
  "entities": [
    "User",
    "Match",
    "Team",
    "Player"
  ],
  "repositories": [
    "UserRepository",
    "MatchRepository",
    "TeamRepository",
    "PlayerRepository"
  ],
  "apis": [
    "User API",
    "Match API",
    "Statistics API",
    "Notification API"
  ],
  "validation_rules": [
    "User input validation",
    "Match input validation",
    "Player input validation",
    "Team input validation"
  ],
  "security_implementation": [
    "HTTPS enforcement",
    "JWT for authentication",
    "Data encryption"
  ],
  "error_handling": [
    "Custom error messages",
    "Logging errors",
    "Retry mechanisms"
  ],
  "developer_notes": [
    "Detailed API documentation and codebase available on GitHub.",
    "Test cases and environment setup instructions provided.",
    "CI/CD pipeline configured with automated deployment to cloud services."
  ]
}
